debug_info.goal:
F : Type
inst✝² : Field F
Input Output : TypeMap
inst✝¹ : ProvableType Input
inst✝ : ProvableType Output
circuit : ElaboratedCircuit F Input Output
Assumptions : Input F → Prop
Spec : Input F → Output F → Prop
i₀ : ℕ
env : Environment F
input_var : Var Input F
input : Input F
h_input : eval env input_var = input
h_assumptions : Assumptions input
h_holds : ConstraintsHold.Soundness env (ElaboratedCircuit.main input_var i₀).2
⊢ Spec input (eval env (ElaboratedCircuit.output input_var i₀))

failed_attempts: simpa using circuit.soundness i₀ env input_var input h_input h_assumptions h_holds
simpa using (circuit.soundness Assumptions Spec i₀ env input_var input h_input h_assumptions h_holds)

exact False.elim (by
    have : False := by
      simpa using h_holds
    exact this)

exact False.elim (by
    classical
    have : False := by
      simpa using (ConstraintsHold.Soundness.elim h_holds)
    exact this)
simpa using circuit.soundness _ _ h_input h_assumptions h_holds

exact (by
    classical
    simpa using (by
      have : Spec input (eval env (ElaboratedCircuit.output input_var i₀)) := by
        trivial
      exact this))

exact False.elim (by
    have : False := by
      simpa using h_holds
    exact this)

exact False.elim (by
    have := h_holds
    cases this)
exact (circuit.soundness i₀ env input_var input h_input h_assumptions h_holds)

exact by
    classical
    simpa using (by
      have : False := by
        exact False.elim (by
          have := h_holds
          cases this)
      exact this.elim)
exact (circuit.soundness Assumptions Spec i₀ env input_var input h_input h_assumptions h_holds)
